[+] Execution complete naturally in 159 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 159) ===
x0:    0 | x1:  236 | x2: -1610 | x3:    1 | x4:    1 | x5: -1610 | x6: -767 | x7:   -2 |
